tornado.name: Tornado
tornado.desc: Shuffles the unmatched cards. Default ability.
tornado.story: Born from a legendary gust, the Tornado sweeps the board and reshuffles every still-hidden card. It's the power every player masters from their very first steps.
tornado.timing: Trigger it when you've memorized few cards, or right before your opponent chains pairs: the shuffle wipes out their advantage in one move.

levels.1: Shuffles the unmatched cards (1×/game). You pass the turn.
levels.2: You keep your turn after the shuffle.

freeze.name: Freeze
freeze.desc: Make the opponent skip their next turn.
freeze.story: The Whale's icy breath freezes your opponent in place: while they stand still, you chain your moves.
freeze.timing: Use it to play again right away and keep the initiative when your opponent is about to chain pairs.

levels.1: The opponent skips their next turn.
levels.2: The opponent skips their next 2 turns.
levels.3: The opponent skips their next 3 turns.

reveal.name: Reveal
reveal.desc: Briefly reveals a few random cards.
reveal.story: The Owl's piercing gaze sees through the back of the cards and shows you a few of them in the blink of an eye — it's up to you to memorize them.
reveal.timing: Use it to memorize cards, then go find them on your turn.

swap.name: Steal
swap.desc: Steal a pair the opponent already found.
swap.story: The mischievous Octopus reaches its tentacles over the enemy's loot and snatches a pair they already won — daylight robbery.
swap.timing: Save it for key moments: swing the score by ripping away the opponent's hard-earned pairs.

levels.1: Steal 1 pair found by the opponent.
levels.2: Steal 2 pairs found by the opponent.

shield.name: Shield
shield.desc: Shields your turn from one mistake without losing it.
shield.story: The Lion's mane rises into a golden shield: even on a miss, you keep the turn and press your assault.
shield.timing: Switch it on before a risky move: if you're wrong, you won't hand your turn to the opponent.

levels.1: Cancels 1 mistake without losing the turn.

offline.title: No Internet Connection
offline.message: This feature requires an internet connection. Please connect to Wi-Fi or mobile data and try again.

prelude.s1: Once upon a time, FLIPIA, the world of emojis, was a happy land where everyone had a perfect memory.
prelude.s2: But one day, the Demon King unleashed his weapon and erased the memory of all FLIPIA...
prelude.s3: Thanks to the Angels, a few emojis gained powers: to resist the Demon King... and to restore memory through the memory game.
prelude.s4: Despite their gifts, the chosen ones bent before the Demon King's malice... So the Royal Emojis summoned a being from another world, its memory untouched.
prelude.s5: You! The only one able to master every gift of the Angels. Reborn as an emoji: defeat the Demon King and bring FLIPIA's memory back!
prelude.s6: But old rituals are fickle: the portal flickered, screamed... and hurled you far, far away from the castle.
prelude.s7: You open your eyes in the smoke. A village is burning. Before you stands Gromak, Brigade Chief of the Demon King.
prelude.s8: Here is your first step, hero: challenge Gromak to a memory battle and give the villagers their memories back.

epilogue.title: Epilogue — The Memory Guild
epilogue.belicWinText: Gromak bites the dust! But out of the shadows swoops Belic, officer of the Demon King, come to carry off his fallen champion...
epilogue.belicLoseText: Then out of the shadows comes Belic, officer of the Demon King. He scoops up Gromak, stares you down... and both vanish.
epilogue.belicBubble: You may have saved this village, hero... but you will NEVER defeat us!
epilogue.winText: Memory returns to the village like light after the storm. And that very evening, the Memory Guild opens its doors to you, hero.
epilogue.winBubble: Thank you, hero! Join our Guild!
epilogue.loseText: All seemed lost... until a roar split the smoke. Gromak fell back before the imperial guard — saved, just in time.
epilogue.encourageText: The villagers lift you up, one by one. "Every hero falls first," they say. The Memory Guild will forge your revenge.

brigadeChief.role: Brigade Chief of the Demon King
brigadeChief.intro: So YOU are the "hero"? My brigade already erased this village's memory. You're next!

campaign.title: Campaign
campaign.encounterHint: Match the pairs to restore the memory

chapter1.title: The Road of Ashes

depart.s1: At the Memory Guild, your first mission awaits: reach Bourg-Soleil, the neighboring village that has been silent for days.
depart.s2: The Fox, a champion blessed by the Angels, volunteers as your guide. Her Tornado gift has saved many travelers.
depart.s3: The road winds through the hills. The sun rises over FLIPIA... but no one remembers its name anymore.
depart.s4: In the distance, no smoke rises from Bourg-Soleil. Not a sound, not a song. A silence that bodes nothing good.
depart.s5: Suddenly, a figure staggers along the path. An old emoji wanders in the mist, lost in his own world...
depart.b2: I know the way, follow me!
depart.b4: No smoke... that's a bad sign.

village.s1: Guided by Tomir, you finally pass through the gates of Bourg-Soleil. The village stands intact... or so it seems.
village.s2: Its people wander with empty eyes. No more laughter, no more memories. The brigade has already erased everything.
village.s3: Tomir stops in the middle of his own street. His house is right there... but he walks past without seeing it.
village.s4: Shadows leap from the alleys: the brigands! They surround the travelers, delighted by such easy loot.
village.s5: And a laugh you already know tears through the silence. Gromak springs out, angrier than ever!
village.b3: My street... I don't recognize it anymore...
village.b5: YOU?! This time I won't be alone!

outro.s1: Memory returns to Bourg-Soleil like light after the storm. The stolen memories find their way home one by one.
outro.s2: The whole village celebrates. Laughter returns — and with it the names, the faces, the forgotten songs.
outro.s3: Tomir finds his house... and his daughter, who waited at the door every evening without knowing why.
outro.s4: That evening, the Fox rests a paw on your shoulder: from now on, she walks at your side.
outro.s5: But the road is only beginning. Up north, the sea froze all at once... The Frozen Bay awaits, hero.

tomir.s1: You approach slowly. The old emoji trembles, eyes lost in the void. He doesn't run... he no longer even knows why he should.
tomir.s2: He searches his memory like an empty house. His name, his street, his face in the mirror: everything is gone.
tomir.s3: The Fox sniffs the air and growls: the brigade's scent. It wasn't the years that stole his memory... it was the demons.
tomir.s4: So you kneel before him. The Angels' gift warms your hands: you can piece his memories back together.
tomir.s5: Memory fragments float around him — a house, a child's face, the smell of warm bread. It's up to you to reunite them, hero.
tomir.b4: Look at me. I can help you.
tomir.intro: I... I no longer know my name. Nor where my home is... Please, help me!
tomir.success: Tomir! My name is Tomir! And my home... it's in Bourg-Soleil! Follow me, I know the way!
tomir.o1: The memories settle back one by one: his name, his house, his daughter's laugh, the smell of warm bread. Tomir weeps with joy.
tomir.o2: "My home is in Bourg-Soleil, I know every shortcut!" Tomir takes the lead, his step suddenly light. Onward!

ambush.name: Brigand
ambush.intro: Heh heh... amnesiac travelers don't even remember being robbed!
ambush.s1: Tomir leads you toward Bourg-Soleil when the Fox stops dead, ears up. Something is moving in the bushes...
ambush.s2: By the roadside, empty-eyed travelers are being robbed without reacting. They don't even remember being stolen from.
ambush.s3: Brigands leap from the bushes and surround you! Profiteers of the chaos, they strip FLIPIA's forgotten ones bare.
ambush.s4: The Fox growls and takes her place at your side. These cowards don't yet know the power of an intact memory.
ambush.s5: The brigand chief sneers and pulls out a stolen deck of cards. In FLIPIA, even thieves settle scores in a memory duel!
ambush.o1: The brigands bolt, abandoning their loot! The travelers get their belongings back... even if they don't remember losing them.
ambush.o2: Fleeing, the brigand chief dropped something more precious than a purse: Gromak is gathering his brigade at Bourg-Soleil. The Fox wrinkles her muzzle — time is short.

gromak.intro: The Guild's little "hero"... My brigade already erased this village. You, I'll erase for good!
gromak.s1: On Bourg-Soleil's square, the brigands part in silence. A heavy step shakes the ground: Gromak steps forward.
gromak.s2: He has forgotten nothing of his defeat at the village. His rage has grown every night since you humiliated him before Belic.
gromak.s3: Around you, the empty-eyed villagers don't even grasp the danger. Tomir trembles behind you.
gromak.s4: The Fox whispers a warning: Gromak's tornado has grown stronger. This time, the fight is real.
gromak.s5: Gromak snaps his cards. The fate of Bourg-Soleil is decided now — may the best memory win!
gromak.o1: Gromak falls to his knees, his cards scattered to the wind. His brigade scrambles into the alleys without looking back.
gromak.o2: And above Bourg-Soleil, the first memories shimmer like fireflies. The villagers blink... something is coming back to them.

chapter1.trainHint: Sharpen your memory, hero — the road to the Frozen Bay will be harsh. Train to fund the expedition!
